emails.subject: RE: Anything happening today?
emails.body: RE: Anything happening today? Not really...someone from Williams called you regarding a document that needs to be signed by the 30th.. is that a C/A for NWPipe.... She was covering for Jan, I did not get a chance to take the call, just heard about it... BT To: Tycholiz, Barry

emails.subject: RE: Anything happening today?
emails.body: I sent it to Gerald last week it is an electronic authorization form to transact on Kern's rapids system need to return by 11/30. Have a nice few days off and see you Monday. SM

emails.subject: RE: Anything happening today?
emails.body: thanks, enjoy the few days off...BT
